rationale: Watchlist is at cap=16 and well-aligned with the investor profile thesis at year-end 2022. Coverage across all profile waves is balanced: AI/tech (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, SPY, SMH) is well-positioned for the just-launched ChatGPT-era inflection (OpenAI's ChatGPT released 2022-11-30, already crossing one million users within one week, triggering a multi-fold increase in AI-positive corporate sentiment); nuclear (URA, CCJ, NLR) reflects the post-IRA (2022-08-22) nuclear renaissance and tight uranium supply (Cameco contracted a record 80 Mlb in 2022, uranium futures at ~$48/lb on 2022-12-07, +12% YTD); geopolitical energy (LNG, XLE) captures the Russia-Ukraine-driven European LNG demand (Cheniere produced ~11% of global LNG in 2022 with 70%+ flowing to Europe); rockets (RKLB) and robotics (BOTZ, ISRG) and quantum (IONQ) cover the named next-waves; defense/demographics has ITA coverage benefiting from record world military spending of $2.24T in 2022. No current ticker has a thesis-breaking stale catalyst at this date, and no candidate add would clearly outrank an existing name on the profile's wave logic. The starter watchlist is already thesis-coherent for 2022-12-31 conditions.

evidence.bullet: ChatGPT launched 2022-11-30 by OpenAI (Microsoft's largest investor and exclusive cloud partner); >1M users in first week kicks off corporate AI sentiment surge.
Cameco reported record 80 Mlb uranium contracting in 2022 with 17 Mkg conversion services; uranium futures ~$48/lb on 2022-12-07, +12% YTD on tight supply.
Cheniere produced ~11% of global LNG in 2022 with >70% to Europe (~40 bcm regasified), roughly doubling 2021 European volumes and covering ~30% of the Russian shortfall.
World military spending hit an all-time high of $2.24T in 2022 (+3.7% YoY, 8th consecutive yearly rise), driven by Russia-Ukraine war and Central/Western European rearmament.
Q4 2022 da Vinci procedures grew ~18% YoY despite China COVID drag; full-year procedure growth approaching pre-pandemic levels with solid installed base growth.
